mapper.update: UPDATE mbr_member SET library_id = COALESCE(#{m.libraryId}, library_id), name = COALESCE(#{m.name}, name), name_normalized = COALESCE(lower(#{m.nameNormalized}), name_normalized), email = COALESCE(#{m.email}, email), email_lower = COALESCE(lower(#{m.emailLower}), email_lower), phone_enc = CASE WHEN #{m.phone} IS NULL THEN phone_enc ELSE pgp_sym_encrypt(#{m.phone}, #{pass}) END, phone_normalized = COALESCE(#{m.phoneNormalized}, phone_normalized), birthdate = COALESCE(#{m.birthdate}, birthdate), member_type_code = COALESCE(#{m.memberTypeCode}, member_type_code), status = COALESCE(#{m.status}, status), address_json = CASE WHEN #{m.addressJson, typeHandler=com.tulip.common.data.handler.JsonbTypeHandler} IS NULL THEN address_json ELSE #{m.addressJson, typeHandler=com.tulip.common.data.handler.JsonbTypeHandler} END, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{m.updatedBy} WHERE id = #{m.id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE mbr_member SET status = #{status}, suspended_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'SUSPENDED' THEN now() ELSE NULL END, suspended_reason = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'SUSPENDED' THEN #{reason} ELSE NULL END, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE mbr_member SET deleted_at = now(), status = 'SUSPENDED', updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.sql: SELECT id, tenant_id, library_id, public_id, member_no, name, name_normalized, email, email_lower, CASE WHEN phone_enc IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE pgp_sym_decrypt(phone_enc, #{pass}) END AS phone_plain, phone_normalized, birthdate, member_type_code, status, address_json, suspended_at, suspended_reason, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted_at, version FROM mbr_member
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mbr_member WHERE email_lower = lower(#{email}) AND deleted_at IS NULL AND id <> #{excludeId}
